name: directory-entries
description: Directory entry semantics and trailing slash consistency per pack.md Section 2.3.2.1

tests.name: trailing_slash_directory
tests.description: Path ending with / MUST be treated as directory entry

tests.name: no_trailing_slash_file
tests.description: Path without trailing / MUST be treated as file entry

tests.name: directory_nonzero_compressed_size
tests.description: Directory entry with nonzero compressed size MUST be rejected

tests.name: directory_nonzero_uncompressed_size
tests.description: Directory entry with nonzero uncompressed size MUST be rejected

tests.name: attr_directory_no_slash_rejected
tests.description: Entry with directory attributes but NO trailing slash MUST be rejected (R-323)

tests.name: attr_file_with_slash_rejected
tests.description: Entry with file attributes but trailing slash MUST be rejected (R-347)

tests.name: attr_directory_with_slash_valid
tests.description: Consistent directory attributes and trailing slash are valid

tests.name: no_attrs_trailing_slash_valid
tests.description: No explicit attributes, trailing slash alone determines directory semantics

implementation_notes.trailing_slash_is_authoritative: The trailing slash determines directory-ness, not platform attributes
implementation_notes.attribute_check: Only check attribute consistency when explicit attributes are present
implementation_notes.portability: Many ZIP tools do not set Unix mode bits; trailing slash alone must work

notes: Per pack.md Section 2.3.2.1: Directory semantics are determined by the trailing slash. Directory entries MUST have compressed and uncompressed size of 0. If platform-specific directory attributes are present, they MUST be consistent with the trailing slash.
